{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "The wmiprvse.exe process is making repeated connections to the \\lsass named pipe, which is a common technique used for credential dumping. This behavior, especially the frequency, deviates from typical legitimate WMI provider host activity.",
  "indicators": [
    "wmiprvse.exe",
    "pipe_connect",
    "PIPE[\\lsass]",
    "credential dumping",
    "samcli.dll",
    "logoncli.dll"
  ]
